params.name: Killing Stone
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Mar 1, AD 950, the Killing Stone was used for the first time as a magic weapon of Onmyojis. 

In Nara, Onmyoji Abbe defeated the fox demon that had been poisoning the general's mansion for years, and sealed it in a Killing Stone. This stone is generated inside Mt. Fuji. These perforated stones are made from a series of interactions that can produce toxic substances. This is why it is called the Killing Stone. The stone releases toxic gas after the fox demon is trapped in the stone. This is be …
